steps.action: Talk to Konia Swiftfoot at the guard tower
steps.notes: Start here. Konia points you into the torch handoff chain.

steps.action: Give Torch of Misty to Fajio Knejo
Give Torch of Ro to Andad Filla
Give Torch of Rathe to Misty Tekcihta
Give Proof of Speed to Konia Swiftfoot
Talk to Serra in Unrest
Talk to Belious Naliedin in the Bards Guild
Head to Baenar Swiftsong and say "doll"
steps.notes: Say "doll" to receive the Solusek Mining Company Invoice.

steps.action: Give Solusek Mining Company Invoice to Marfen Binkdirple
steps.notes: Solusek's Eye is also known as Sol A.

steps.action: Give Mechanical Doll to Serra
Give Note for Baener to Baenar Swiftsong
Give Note to Maligar to Maligar
Kill Maligar's Enraged Doppleganger
Give Maligar's Head to Baenar Swiftsong
Give Mahlin's Mystical Bongos to Konia Swiftfoot
Talk to Kelkim Menkia
Kill Blackwing
Kill Phurzikon or Nezekezena
Kill Eldrig the Old
Give the three guts to Kelkim Menkia
Talk to Vedico Windwisper
Kill Quag Maelstrom
Give Alluring Horn to Vedico Windwisper
Give Note to Forpar Fizfla to Forpar Fizfla
Kill Phinigel Autropos
Kill Amygdalan knight or Amygdalan warrior
Kill Drolvarg Warlord
Give Forpar's Note to Himself, backbone, tendril, and skull to Forpar Fizfla
Kill Lord Nagafen or Talendor
Kill Gorenaire or Lady Vox
Obtain smithing supplies for Metal Bits
Give Metal Bits and dragon scales to Forpar Fizfla
Kill Trakanon
Give the lute body, lute head, and strings to Forpar Fizfla
Give the pages and Mystical Lute to Baldric Slezaf to receive the Singing Short Sword
Kill Schmendrik Lavawalker
Kill A Spirit of Flame
Kill Lord Bergurgle
steps.notes: You can camp Lord Bergurgle, but the crown can also drop from random goblins in Lake Rathe.

steps.action: Give Lord Bergurgle's Crown to Schmendrik Lavawalker
steps.notes: Oil of Fennin Ro is not needed for the epic, but the turn-in starts the Natasha event.

steps.action: Kill Schmendrik Lavawalker after Natasha attacks
Kill A Spirit of Flame after the Natasha event
Give Damaged Goblin Crown to Natasha Whitewater
Give Ornate Sea Shell to Omat Vastsea
Give Coral Statue of Tarew to a Seeker
Kill Plasmatic Priest
Kill Lord Gimblox
Give Blood Soaked Plasmatic Priest Robe to Omat Vastsea
Give Lord Gimblox's Signet Ring to Natasha Whitewater
Give Ornate Sea Shell to Naxot Deepwater
Kill Ixiblat Fer
steps.notes: You only need the Sceptre. On this server it can come from other mobs in the same Tier 2 Kunark raid bucket, so Ixiblat is not always required.

steps.action: Kill Overking Bathezid
steps.notes: You only need the Singed Scroll. On this server it can come from other mobs in the same Tier 2 Kunark raid bucket, so Overking is not always required.

steps.action: Give Singed Scroll and Sceptre of Ixiblat Fer to Omat Vastsea
Give Message to Natasha Whitewater
Give Shimmering Pearl to Zordak Ragefire
Kill mobs in Skyfire Mountains for four Pearlescent Fragments
Combine four Pearlescent Fragments in Zordak's Box of Bindings
Give Assembled Pearlescent Shard to Warder Cecilia
Kill Zordak Ragefire in Skyfire Mountains
steps.notes: The dragon chain is still valid, but the required pieces can also come from easier mobs in the same Tier 2 Kunark raid bucket. Kill the dragons if you want their extra loot.

steps.action: Kill Zordakalicus Ragefire
steps.notes: The dragon chain is still valid, but the required pieces can also come from easier mobs in the same Tier 2 Kunark raid bucket. Kill the dragons if you want their extra loot.

steps.action: Combine Pearlescent Seal and Swirling Pearl in Impure Heart of Zordak Ragefire
Give Zordak Ragefire's Heart to Omat Vastsea
Give Orb of Frozen Water, Orb of Clear Water, and Orb of Vapor to Jhassad Oceanson
Wait for Avatar of Water to arrive near Jhassad Oceanson
steps.notes: The Avatar of Water may path along the shore before stopping near Jhassad.

steps.action: Give Orb of the Triumvirate to Avatar of Water
Talk to Telin Darkforest and say "action"
Give Worn Note to Faelin Bloodbriar
spawn_notes: Kill orc pawns near +1535, +570 until Faelin Bloodbriar spawns.

steps.action: Give Faelin's Ring to Giz X'Tin
Give Dark Metal Coin to Telin Darkforest
Give Worn Dark Metal Coin to Athele
Give amulet to Sionae, Nuien, then Teloa
steps.notes: Giving the amulet to Sionae spawns Nuien. Nuien returns the amulet and spawns Teloa. Give the amulet to Teloa and follow her to the gathering spot.
spawn_notes: Dark Elf Corruptor and two Dark Elf Reavers will spawn.

steps.action: Kill Dark Elf Corruptor and Dark Elf Reavers
Give Fleshbound Tome to Althele
Give Earth Stained Note to Ella Foodcrafter
Forage the four mixture ingredients
steps.notes: Forage Chilled Tundra Root in Everfrost, plus Sweetened Mudroot, Speckled Molded Mushroom, and Ripened Heartfruit in their appropriate forage zones.

steps.action: Combine the four foraged ingredients in the Shiny Tin Bowl
Get Crushed Pot from Alrik Farsight
Give Crushed Pot to Farios Elianos
Give Grocery List to Merchant Nora
Give Bag of Provisions to Farios Elianos
Give Receipt to Alrik Farsight
Forage Rose of Firiona
Give Rose of Firiona to Merdan
Give Wood Painting to a human skeleton
Give Silver Chained Locket to Niera Farbreeze
Kill Black Reaver in City of Mist, then give Jade Reaver to Kinlo Strongarm
steps.notes: Jade Reaver drops from Black Reavers in City of Mist and is turned in to Kinlo Strongarm for Enchanted Clay.

steps.action: Combine Ancient Pattern, Platinum Speckled Powder, and Enchanted Clay on a pottery wheel
Give Runecrested Bowl and Hardened Mixture to Ella Foodcrafter
Kill Venril Sathir
Give Softly Glowing Stone and Pulsing Green Stone to Foloal Stormforest
Give Warmly Glowing Stone to Ealla
Kill Corrupted Shaman
Kill Corrupted Wooly Mammoth
Kill Corrupted Hill Giant
Give Clean Lakewater, Chunk of Tundra, and Ancient Rock to Xanuusus
Give Warm Pulsing Treant Heart to Yeka Ias
Kill Corrupted Seahorse
Kill Corrupted Seafury Cyclops
Kill Corrupted Brownie
Give Kedge Cave Crystals, Ocean of Tears Seavine, and Green Heartwood Branch to Pained Unicorn
Give Gleaming Unicorn Horn to Silox Azrix
Kill Corrupted Gorilla
Kill Corrupted Barracuda
Kill Ulump Pujik
Give Froglok Essence to Dolgin Codslayer
Kill Faydedar
Give Froglok Essence, Green Tree Bark, Pure Lakewater, and Pod of Seawater to Nekexin Virulence
Give Cleansed Spirit of Antonica, Cleansed Spirit of Faydwer, Cleansed Spirit of Kunark, and Elaborate Scimitar to Xanuusus
Hail Stofo Olan
steps.notes: Starts the note-making portion of the quest.

steps.action: Hail Reania Jukle
Charm Ghoul Scribe and give Empty Ink Vial
Give Shining Metallic Robes to Rilgor Plegnog
Give Mechanical Pen, paper, and quill to Chrislin Baker
Kill Thracken Griften
Give Ink of the Dark, Mechanical Pen, and White Paper to Stofo Olan
Say "Are you Jeb Lurnsed" to Sarnak Imitators
steps.notes: Find the correct Jeb Lurnsed imitator before continuing.

steps.action: Give Copy of Notes to Jeb Lurnsed
Ask Jeb Lurnsed for a sack
Hail Modani Qu'Loni in Scorpikis form
steps.notes: Starts Modani's first staff-piece test.

steps.action: Give Jeb's Seal to Modani Qu'Loni
steps.notes: Starts Modani's test.

steps.action: Hail Joren Nobleheart
steps.notes: Sets up the Chalice of Kings branch.

steps.action: Kill Prince Selrach Di'zok
Give Head of a Prince to Joren Nobleheart
Kill Vessel Drozlin
Give large muddy sandals to Bozlum Blossom
Give Scribbled Parchment to Brokk Boxtripper
Give Gift to Bozlum Blossom
Kill Verina Tomb
Combine Chalice of Kings, Xolion Rod, Snow Blossoms, and Innoruuk's Word in Enchanters Sack; give the sack to Modani
Hail Mizzle Gepple in Clockwork VIIX form
steps.notes: Starts Mizzle's second staff-piece test.

steps.action: Kill Cazel
Pick up the ground spawn The One Key
steps.notes: Requires levitate to safely reach the spawn location.

steps.action: Pick up the Lost Scroll ground spawn behind the bed
Pick up the Book of Charm and Sacrifice ground spawn from the table
Combine Spoon, The One Key, Lost Scroll, and Book of Charm and Sacrifice in Enchanters Sack; give the sack to Clockwork VIIX
Gather Enchanter's Bag and the four raw gems for Nadia's test
steps.notes: Gather these before starting Nadia's enchanted gem sequence.

steps.action: Charm Spectral Librarian and give Diamond
Charm Felia Goldenwing and give Sapphire
Charm Wraith of Jaxion and give Ruby
Charm Impaler Tzilug and give Emerald
Combine the four enchanted gems in Enchanters Sack and give the sack to Nadia Starfeast
Hail Polzin Mrid and give Jeb's Seal
steps.notes: Starts Polzin's test.

steps.action: Kill Wraith of the Shissar at the top of the large temple
Kill Kindle's Ghost
Kill Forsaken Revenants
Kill The Tangrin
Combine Head of the Serpent, Essence of a Ghost, Essence of a Vampire, and Sands of the Mystic in Enchanters Sack; give the sack to Polzin Mrid
Combine all four staff pieces in Enchanters Sack, then give Bundle of Staves to Jeb Lurnsed
steps.notes: Combine the four staff pieces in the sack, then give the Bundle of Staves to Jeb for the epic.

steps.action: Hail Rykas on the southwestern island
Give Token of Mastery to Jahsohn Aksot
steps.notes: Jahsohn sends you after the Magi'kot pages.

steps.action: Kill Enraged Dread Wolf
steps.notes: Nighttime spawn.

steps.action: Kill Tentacle Terror or Dark Terror in the basement
Kill Bloodthirsty Ghouls in the eastern portion
Give the three Torn Pages of Magi`kot to Jahsohn Aksot
Give Words of Magi'kot to Walnan near the docks
steps.notes: Walnan sends you after the elemental powers.

steps.action: Kill Faerie Guards
Kill Gypsy Dancer
Kill Famished Ravener
Kill Blazing Elemental in the northern area
Give all four powers to Walnan
Collect the four Torn Pages of Mastery from Najena mages
steps.notes: Collect the Earth, Fire, Water, and Wind Torn Pages of Mastery from goblin and dark elf mages throughout Najena.

steps.action: Give the four Torn Pages of Mastery to Akksstaff
Give Words of Magi'kot, Power of the Elements, and Words of Mastery to Rykas
Hail Jennus Lyklobar
steps.notes: Starts the Element of Fire hand-in path; bring the three fire pieces back here.

steps.action: Kill named wurms for Burning Embers
Kill Neh'Ashiir
Kill Undertow
Give Torch of the Elements, Burning Embers, Blazing Wand, and Power of the Orb to Jennus Lyklobar
Kill Magi P'Tasa or male forsaken revenants
Kill Slixin Klex in the southeast portion
Obtain Shovel of Ponz and Broom of Trilon
Give Staff of Elemental Mastery: Earth, Dirt of Underfoot, Shovel of Ponz, and Broom of Trilon to Tiblner Milnik
Kill Phinigel Autropos
Kill Captain Rottgrime
Kill Trabul Earthstrider
Give Staff of Elemental Mastery: Water, Tears of Erollisi, and Rain of Karana to Jinalis Andir
Kill mobs on the 7th island for Crown of Elemental Mastery
Kill mobs in The Hole for Elemental Binder
Kill Quillmane
Give Crown of Elemental Mastery, Elemental Binder, and Pegasus Feather Cloak to Kihun Solstin
Hail Kihun Solstin and say "I want to see the master"
spawn_notes: Say "I want to see the master" to spawn Master of Elements if needed.

steps.action: Give all four Elements to Master of Elements
Scribe Spell: Summon Orb and cast it to summon Orb of Mastery
Kill Targin the Rock in the king chamber
steps.notes: Skip this whole robe-crafting branch if you loot Robe of the Lost Circle from Brother Qwinn or Brother Zephyl.

steps.action: Give Purple Headband and Code of Zan Fi to Brother Qwinn
steps.notes: Skip this whole robe-crafting branch if you loot Robe of the Lost Circle from Brother Qwinn or Brother Zephyl.

steps.action: Camp Raster of Guk near the minotaur elder room
steps.notes: Skip this whole robe-crafting branch if you loot Robe of the Lost Circle from Brother Qwinn or Brother Zephyl.

steps.action: Give Red Sash of Order and The Idol to Brother Zephyl
steps.notes: Skip this whole robe-crafting branch if you loot Robe of the Lost Circle from Brother Qwinn or Brother Zephyl.

steps.action: Craft Shadow Silk
steps.notes: Skip this whole robe-crafting branch if you loot Robe of the Lost Circle from Brother Qwinn or Brother Zephyl.

steps.action: Craft Robe of the Lost Circle
steps.notes: Skip this whole robe-crafting branch if you loot Robe of the Lost Circle from Brother Qwinn or Brother Zephyl.

steps.action: Kill Iksar Betrayer
steps.notes: Either Iksar Betrayer or Drolvarg Pawbuster can drop the Metal Pipe for the robe turn-in. On this server, the pipe can also come from other mobs in the same Kunark random-loot bucket.

steps.action: Kill Drolvarg Pawbuster
steps.notes: Either Iksar Betrayer or Drolvarg Pawbuster can drop the Metal Pipe for the robe turn-in. On this server, the pipe can also come from other mobs in the same Kunark random-loot bucket.

steps.action: Charm Brother Balatin and give two Metal Pipes plus Robe of the Lost Circle
Kill named mobs for Immortals
Give Immortals to Tomekeeper Danl
Give Danl's Reference and Robe of the Whistling Fists to Lheao
Give Book of Celestial Fists to crazy Kaiaren
spawn_notes: Kaiaren returns the book and attacks.

steps.action: Have an enchanter cast Blanket of Forgetfulness on Kaiaren, then hail sane Kaiaren
steps.notes: Kaiaren gives you the Eejag task after the memory wipe.

steps.action: Find the fire sprite and say "I challenge you, Eejag"
spawn_notes: Say "I challenge you, Eejag" to spawn Eejag.

steps.action: Kill Eejag in the lava pit near the Solusek entrances
Return to sane Kaiaren with Charred Scale
steps.notes: Kaiaren gives the scale back and sends you to the next fight.

steps.action: Give Charred Scale to a presence on Djorn's Island
steps.notes: Watch for azaracks pathing onto the island; they can aggro Gwan and the sword mobs.

steps.action: Kill Gwan
steps.notes: Gwan procs knockback, so fight him in the windmill if you can.

steps.action: Give Breath of Gwan to a sleeping ogre
Kill Trunt
Give Trunt's Head to Astral Projection
Give Eye of Kaiaren to Astral Projection on the Lake of Ill Omen platform
Kill Vorash and Deep
spawn_notes: Kill Vorash and Deep; Xenovorash spawns.

steps.action: Kill Xenovorash
Give Book of Celestial Fists and Demon Fangs to Kaiaren
Hail Venenzi Oberzendi
steps.notes: Starts the apprentice symbol chain.

steps.action: Hail Kazen Fecae and say "wish to study dark arts"
steps.notes: Kazen sends you after Sir Edwin Motte.

steps.action: Kill Sir Edwin Motte
Give Head of Sir Edwin Motte to Kazen Fecae
Give Symbol of the Apprentice to Venenzi Oberzendi
Kill Najena
Give Flowing Black Robe to Venenzi Oberzendi
Give Rolling Stone Moss and Twisted Symbol of the Apprentice to Emkel Kabae
Hail Ssessthrass and give Symbol of the Serpent
Kill the Herbalist
Give Manisi Herb and Scaled Symbol of the Serpent to Ssessthrass
Give Refined Manisi Herb to Emkel Kabae
Give Symbol of Testing to Kazen Fecae
spawn_notes: Begins the Bone Golem, Failed Apprentice, and Tormented Spirit encounter chain.

steps.action: Kill Bone Golem
steps.notes: First kill in the Lake Rathe encounter chain.

steps.action: Kill Failed Apprentice
steps.notes: Second kill in the Lake Rathe encounter chain.

steps.action: Kill Tormented Spirit
Give Symbol of Insanity to Drendico Metalbones
Say "i wish to be tested by jzil" to Drakis Bloodcaster
steps.notes: Dialogue trigger: say "i wish to be tested by jzil".

steps.action: Kill Azeraks on the second island
Kill Watchful Guardian
Kill Keeper of Souls
Give Silver Disc, Spiroc Feathers, and Black Silk Cape to Jzil G'Six
Kill Innoruuk or Plane of Hate mini-bosses
Kill Cazic Thule or Dread, Fright, and Terror
Give Journal of Drendico, Slime Blood of Cazic-Thule, Eye of Innoruuk, and Cloak of Spiroc Feathers to Drendico Metalbones
Give Prepared Reagent Box to Kazen Fecae
Give Tome of Instruction to Gkzzallk
Give Gkzzallk in a Box to Kazen Fecae
Hail Kalatrina Plossen in the Hall of Truth basement
Say "Truth is good" to Guard Alayle, then give Sealed Letter [To Alayle]
steps.notes: Say "Truth is good" before the turn-in.

steps.action: Return to Kalatrina, then visit the Office of People and ask Rashinda Elore about "Blades"
steps.notes: Breadcrumb step that points you toward Groflah and Zimel.

steps.action: Give Tattered Flier to Groflah Steadirt at Groflah's Forge
steps.notes: Meet him at Seafarer's Roost at night if needed.

steps.action: Give four bottles of Drom's Champagne to Tykar Renlin
steps.notes: Bunker Cell #1 step.

steps.action: Craft Edible Goo and Bog Juice
Give Blanket, Edible Goo, and Bog Juice to a prisoner
Give Key H.K. 102 to Assistant Kiolna
Kill Sir Lucan D'Lere and loot the undead form
steps.notes: Sir Lucan spawns twice: living, then undead. Loot Testimony of Truth from the undead form.

steps.action: Give Testimony of Truth to Valeron Dushire
Complete the Merko Quetalis and Altunic Jartin testimony sub-quest
steps.npc_mob: Merko Quetalis / Altunic Jartin / Guard Willia
steps.notes: Long testimony branch: work through Merko, Altunic, the token sequence, and Guard Willia to recover Testimony of Truth.

steps.action: Kill Xicotl
Give all four SoulFire items to Brother Hayle
steps.notes: Brother Hayle is in South Karana around -1514, 2246. Give all four items simultaneously.

steps.action: Get Ghoul's Heart
steps.notes: Right tower in Unrest.

steps.action: Get Blade of Nobility
Get Hilt of the Nobleman
Get Amstaf's Scroll
Obtain the Ghoulbane combine container from Ruathey
Combine the Ghoulbane components
steps.notes: You can also get Ghoulbane directly from Froglok Shin Lord in Upper Guk or Joren Nobleheart in Felwithe B.

steps.action: Obtain Torn, Burnt Book
Obtain Torn, Frost-Covered Book
Give Torn, Burnt Book, Torn, Frost-Covered Book, and 1000pp to Rineval Talyas
Give Book of Scale to Oracle of K'Arnon
Give Miragul's Phylactery to Lich of Miragul
Kill True Miragul
steps.notes: High-difficulty necromancer encounter.

steps.action: Complete the Plane of Sky quest-room setup for Inte Akera
steps.notes: Have a friend buy the Efreeti Key from the Keymaster, enter the quest room, hail Dason, return the book, and give 500pp to Dirkog Steelhand.

steps.action: Inte Akera spawns on the fourth island windmill
steps.notes: Five minute despawn timer.
spawn_notes: Inte Akera spawns on the 4th island windmill.

steps.action: Give SoulFire to Inte Akera
Give Ghoulbane to Inte Akera
Give Inte's blessings, Miragul's Head, and Miragul's Robe to Inte Akera
steps.notes: Must be better than Apprehensive with Deepwater Knights.

steps.action: Kill Kirak Vil
steps.notes: Tell him "I am a paladin" to make him attack.

steps.action: Kill Keeper of the Tombs
Kill Thought Destroyer
Complete the Jark and Nella food quest
steps.notes: Find Jark in the North Kaladim mines, say "get your dinner", find Nella, get the food, and return to Jark.

steps.action: Give Tainted Darksteel Breastplate and Pure Crystal to Reklon Gnallen
Complete the peasant woman and Joshua water errand
steps.notes: Find the peasant woman in East Freeport, say "take it to him", then give the bucket to Joshua.

steps.action: Give Tainted Darksteel Sword and Bucket of Pure Water to Reklon Gnallen
Give Tainted Darksteel Shield to Elia the Pure
Give all three Gleaming Crested items to Reklon Gnallen
Give Mark of Atonement and Fiery Avenger to Irak Altil
steps.notes: Irak Altil is a skeleton with a long respawn timer.

steps.action: Talk to Telin Darkforest, say "what action"
Spawn Faelin Bloodbriar (kill orc pawn PHs) give note
Give ring to Giz X'Tin (roams)
Give coin to Telin Darkforest
Give coin to Arch Druid Althele
Give amulet to Sionae, Nuien, then Teloa
steps.notes: Giving the amulet to Sionae spawns Nuien. Nuien returns the amulet and spawns Teloa. Give the amulet to Teloa and follow her to the gathering spot.
spawn_notes: Dark Elf Corruptor and two Dark Elf Reavers will spawn.

steps.action: Kill Dark Elf Corruptor and Dark Elf Reavers
Give Fleshbound Tome to Althele
Give note to Ella Foodcrafter
Forage the four mixture ingredients
steps.notes: Forage Chilled Tundra Root in Everfrost, plus Sweetened Mudroot, Speckled Molded Mushroom, and Ripened Heartfruit in their appropriate forage zones.

steps.action: Combine the four foraged ingredients in the Shiny Tin Bowl
Get Crushed Pot from Alrik Farsight
Pot -> Farios -> Grocery List -> Nora -> Provisions -> Farios -> Receipt
Receipt to Alrik
Forage Rose of Firiona
Rose -> Merdan -> Painting -> skeleton -> locket -> Niera Farbreeze -> Powder
Kill Black Reaver and obtain Jade Reaver
steps.notes: Black Reavers can drop Jade Reaver.

steps.action: Give Jade Reaver to Kinlo Strongarm
Combine Pattern + Powder + Clay on pottery wheel (pottery wheel)
Give Runecrested Bowl + Hardened Mixture to Ella Ella Foodcrafter
Kill Venril Sathir (live version)
Give both stones to Foloal Stormforest
Give Warmly Glowing Stone to Telin Darkforest
Give Shiny Tin Bowl to Jaeil the Wretched
Kill Jaeil the Insane
Give hammer to Kinlo Strongarm
Give Soulbound Hammer to Mairee Silentone
Kill Essence Tamer
Give Hammer + Sphere to Mairee
Give Hammer of Ancients to Kinlo
Give Ancient Longsword to Usbak the Old
Give mithril ore to Kinlo
Give Refined Ancient Sword to Telin Darkforest
Give Refined Ancient Sword to Faelin
Obtain Shattered Emerald of Corruption
Give Emerald + Refined Mithril Blade to Xanuusus (loc +1340, +500)
Find Anson McBale at the underwater tunnel entrance
steps.notes: Breadcrumb step that points you toward Stanos.

steps.action: Find Malka Rale in Qeynos Aqueducts
Pickpocket Stained Parchment Top from Founy Jestands
steps.notes: Pickpocket this from Founy.

steps.action: Pickpocket Stained Parchment Bottom from Tani N'Mar
steps.notes: Pickpocket this from Tani N'Mar.

steps.action: Give both stained parchment pieces to Stanos Herkanor
Give Combined Parchment, 100pp, and two Bottles of Milk to Eldreth
Retrieve Book of Souls from Maestro of Rancor's nightstand
Give Scribbled Parchment to Yendar Starpyre
Give Tattered Parchment and Book of Souls to Yendar Starpyre
Complete Jagged Diamond Dagger subquest and kill Renux
steps.notes: As of the 2/17/21 patch, you must now complete this subquest to obtain Jagged Diamond Dagger. Collect four weapons from named/rare mobs in various zones, then give all four to Vilnius the Small in West Karana to receive Jagged Diamond Dagger.

steps.action: Give Translated Parchment to Stanos Herkanor
Give Sealed Box to the dark elf at the cabin ruins
steps.notes: Nighttime step; use Sneak if KoS.

steps.action: Kill General V'Ghera
Kill Phinigel Autropos
Kill Ishva Mal
Kill Ghoul Archmagus
Kill The Oracle
Give all four robes to Vilinus the Small
Give General's Pouch, Cazic Quill, and Jagged Diamond Dagger to Stanos Herkanor
Hail Kurron Ni at the Overthere outpost
steps.notes: Starts the Darkforge armor trade-in path.

steps.action: Trade Darkforge Breastplate, Darkforge Greaves, Darkforge Helm, and 900pp to Kurron Ni
steps.notes: Must first quest the three Darkforge armor pieces.

steps.action: Kill Kurron Ni
steps.notes: Faction cleanup after the Darkforge turn-in.

steps.action: Give Letter to Duriek Bloodpool
steps.notes: Hand in the letter to move into Duriek's branch.

steps.action: Hail Smaka in Neriak Foreign Quarter
steps.notes: Smaka points you toward the elixir purchase.

steps.action: Purchase Cough Elixir from Smaka
steps.notes: Costs 1000pp.

steps.action: Give Cough Elixir to Duriek
steps.notes: Give Duriek the elixir to continue his branch.

steps.action: Kill ratman guard
Give Dusty Tome to Duriek
steps.notes: Give Duriek the tome to continue his branch.

steps.action: Get Ghoulbane
steps.notes: Alternate path: Ghoulbane can also come from Joren Nobleheart in Felwithe B.

steps.action: Get Soul Leech
Get Dark Sword of Blood
Get Blade of Abrogation
Get Drake Spine
Get Decrepit Hide
Get Bar of Enchanted Platinum
steps.notes: Craft or purchase this bar before creating the Decrepit Sheath.

steps.action: Create Decrepit Sheath
Trade Ghoulbane, Soul Leech, Dark Sword of Blood, Blade of Abrogation, and Decrepit Sheath to Duriek
Hail Lhranc in City of Mist
steps.notes: Starts the Lhranc/Kastane branch.

steps.action: Get Soulcase from Hnarthenne Skurl
Get Seal of Kastane from Marl Kastane
Get Note to Marl from Gerot Kastane
Give Note to Marl Kastane
steps.notes: Give Marl the note to continue the Kastane branch.

steps.action: Free Caradon from jail in The Hole
steps.notes: Free Caradon using the cell key from the chest.

steps.action: Kill Kyrenna after the Caradon encounter
steps.notes: Free Caradon first, progress the encounter, then kill Kyrenna.

steps.action: Give Blood of Kyrenna to Marl Kastane
Give Dark Shroud to Ghost of Glohnor
Kill Mummy of Glohnor
Give Head of Glohnor to Gerot Kastane
Give Glohnor Wrappings to Marl Kastane
Combine Heart of Kyrenna and Soulcase
Give Corrupted Ghoulbane, Heart of the Innocent, Head of the Valiant, and Will of Innoruuk to Lhranc
Hail human-form Lhranc
steps.notes: Human-form Lhranc attacks after hail.

steps.action: Kill Lhranc
spawn_notes: Marl Kastane spawns outside after Lhranc dies.

steps.action: Give Lhranc's Token to Marl Kastane
Kill Captain Sureshot
steps.notes: Faction kill before the early spirit dialogue.

steps.action: Hail Lesser Spirit
Hail Bondl Felligan in the sewers
steps.notes: Talk to Bondl before handing him the Tiny Gem.

steps.action: Give Tiny Gem to Bondl Felligan
steps.notes: Follow Bondl after the turn-in.

steps.action: Follow Bondl and hail Greater Spirit
steps.notes: Short spirit handoff before choosing your deity.

steps.action: Claim your deity
steps.notes: Your deity response depends on race.

steps.action: Hail the other Greater Spirit down the hall
Give Opaque Gem to Ooglyn
steps.notes: Follow Ooglyn after the turn-in.

steps.action: Follow Ooglyn and complete the Erud's Crossing NPC sequence
steps.npc_mob: Srafen the Soaked / Dillon / Froham / Abe
steps.notes: Follow the Erud's Crossing chain through Srafen, Dillon, Froham, and Abe.

steps.action: Hail another Greater Spirit
Find the wandering spirit in West Karana
steps.notes: Find this spirit before turning in the Small Gem.

steps.action: Give Small Gem to the wandering spirit
steps.notes: This turn-in advances your faction.

steps.action: Kill Tabien the Goodly
steps.notes: Level 32 target.

steps.action: Kill Glaron the Wicked
steps.notes: Level 32 target.

steps.action: Give Marr's Promise, Envy, and Woe to the wandering spirit
Give Sparkling Gem to Spirit Sentinel
steps.notes: Give the gem to move into the next Spirit Sentinel branch.

steps.action: Hail Black Dire in Castle Mistmoore
steps.notes: Talk to Black Dire before killing him.

steps.action: Kill Black Dire
Give Black Dire Pelt to Spirit Sentinel
Collect the six City of Mist documents
Combine all six documents in the Ancient Journal
Give Completed Report to Spirit Sentinel
steps.notes: Give the report to move into the next Spirit Sentinel branch.

steps.action: Pick up Icon of the High Scale
Kill Lord Ghiosk in City of Mist
Give the High Scale documents to Spirit Sentinel
steps.notes: Give the High Scale documents to continue the Spirit Sentinel branch.

steps.action: Give Icon of the High Scale to High Scale Kirn
steps.notes: Starts the High Scale Kirn fight.

steps.action: Kill High Scale Kirn
Give Engraved Ring to Neh'Ashiir
steps.notes: Starts the Neh'Ashiir fight.

steps.action: Kill Neh'Ashiir
Give Neh'Ashiir's Diary to the second Spirit Sentinel
steps.notes: Give the diary to continue the second Spirit Sentinel branch.

steps.action: Kill any golem in Plane of Fear
steps.notes: Progression kill before Child's Tear.

steps.action: Kill Iksar Child
Give Child's Tear to Rak'Ashiir
steps.notes: Starts the Rak'Ashiir fight.

steps.action: Kill Rak'Ashiir
Give Iksar Scale to Spirit Sentinel
Hail Kargek Redblade and ask about the scabbard and favor
Give Wax Sealed Note to Oknoggin Stonesmacker
steps.notes: Location: loc 800, 1140, between the stone bridge and fallen totem.

steps.action: Give Tiny Lute to Kargek Redblade
steps.notes: Kargek gives you Redblade's Legacy.

steps.action: Give Redblade's Legacy to Tenal Redblade
steps.notes: Tenal is at the end of the canyon near the Highpass ramp.

steps.action: Kill Ice Goblin Wizard
Give Heart of Frost and Totem of the Freezing War to Tenal Redblade
Kill a red dragon
Kill Severilous or Hoshkar
Give Totem of Fiery War, Red Dragon Scales, and Green Dragon Scales to Tenal Redblade
Kill Hand of the Maestro
steps.npc_mob: Hand of the Maestro / Cursed Hand

steps.action: Give Mark of the Sword and Hand of the Maestro to Tenal Redblade
Kill Spiroc Lord on the fifth island
Give Tenal's Note and Spiroc Wingblade to Kargek Redblade
Purchase Keg of Vox Tail Ale from vendors
Kill Ice Giants in Permafrost
Obtain two Rebreathers
steps.notes: Rebreathers can be tinkered or purchased.

steps.action: Give Block of Permafrost, Keg of Vox Tail Ale, and two Rebreathers to Denken Strongpick
steps.notes: Denken is on Aviak Isle.

steps.action: Retrieve Severely Damaged Dragon Head Hilt
steps.notes: Ground spawn in the chessboard area by the king chess piece.

steps.action: Kill Mountain Giant Patriarch
Give Giant Sized Monocle to Mentrax Mountainbone
steps.notes: Mentrax is in the giant fortress at the end of the mine.

steps.action: Kill Fright, Dread, or Terror
Give Severely Damaged Dragon Head Hilt, Rejesiam Ore, and Ball of Everliving Golem to Wenden Blackhammer
Retrieve Unjeweled Dragon Head Hilt
steps.notes: Ground spawn underwater beneath the aviak tower at approximately +2513, +920.

steps.action: Obtain the hilt gems
Give Unjeweled Dragon Head Hilt, Diamond, Black Sapphire, and Jacinth to Wenden Blackhammer
Kill Queen Velazul Di'zok
Combine the blade and hilt pieces in the Red Scabbard
Hail Solomen
steps.notes: Location: 2nd floor, back of zone, fake dresser, take left up the stairs.

steps.action: Give Note to Camin and 1000pp to Camin, then hail him
steps.notes: Camin gives the next clue after the turn-in and hail. He is in the Vasty Deep Inn.

steps.action: Purchase Ro's Breath from Dargon
steps.notes: Costs approximately 1000pp.

steps.action: Give Ro's Breath to Camin

reward_items.name: Ro's Breath [I know who you are.]

steps.action: Give Ro's Breath [I know who you are.] to Dargon
steps.notes: Dargon changes into Arantir during this hand-in.

required_items.name: Ro's Breath [I know who you are.]

reward_items.name: Arantir's Ring [My love has no bounds]

steps.action: Give Arantir's Ring [My love has no bounds] to Challice
steps.notes: Listen to Challice before heading back to Halas.

required_items.name: Arantir's Ring [My love has no bounds]

reward_items.name: Arantir's Ring [I never could love a man like you.]

steps.action: Give the returned ring to Dargon
steps.notes: Arantir tells you about the three other wizards.

required_items.name: Arantir's Ring [I never could love a man like you.]

steps.action: Kill Phinigel Autropos
Kill Venril Sathir
Hail Kandin Firepot
Give Golem Sprocket to Broken Golem
steps.notes: Bring the gear to Plane of Fear; repairing the golem sets up the fight.

steps.action: Kill Broken Golem
steps.notes: The golem attacks after being repaired.

steps.action: Give Green Oil to Kandin Firepot
Give Note to Dargon
Give the three staves to Arantir Karondor
steps.notes: Arantir gives you the Pack container.

steps.action: Give Pack to Solomen
